mapper.insert: insert into user_coupon(user_id, coupon_id, status, threshold_amount, discount_amount, discount_rate, start_time, end_time, receive_time, lock_time, use_time, order_id, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{couponId}, #{status}, #{thresholdAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{discountRate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{receiveTime}, #{lockTime}, #{useTime}, #{orderId}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select uc.*, c.name as coupon_name, c.coupon_type, c.publish_type, c.store_id, c.receive_type, c.status as coupon_status, s.name as store_name from user_coupon uc left join coupon c on uc.coupon_id = c.id left join store s on c.store_id = s.id where uc.id = #{id}
select * from user_coupon where order_id = #{orderId} limit 1
mapper.update: update user_coupon set status = 2, lock_time = #{lockTime}, order_id = #{orderId}, update_time = now() where id = #{userCouponId} and user_id = #{userId} and status = 1
update user_coupon set status = 1, lock_time = null, order_id = null, update_time = #{updateTime} where order_id = #{orderId} and status = 2
update user_coupon set status = 1, lock_time = null, order_id = null, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{userCouponId} and status = 2
mapper.select: select uc.*, c.name as coupon_name, c.coupon_type, c.publish_type, c.store_id, c.receive_type, c.status as coupon_status, s.name as store_name from user_coupon uc inner join coupon c on uc.coupon_id = c.id left join store s on c.store_id = s.id where uc.user_id = #{userId} and uc.status = 1 and c.status = 1 and uc.start_time <= #{now} and uc.end_time >= #{now} and uc.threshold_amount <= #{amount} and (c.publish_type = 1 or (c.publish_type = 2 and c.store_id = #{storeId})) and (c.receive_type = 1 or (c.receive_type = 2 and #{isMember} = 1)) order by c.coupon_type asc, uc.end_time asc, uc.id desc
